description_long: This object is a modern Samsung smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a centered punch-hole front camera at the top. The back is a smooth, matte surface in a light purple color, with a triple camera array and flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power on the right edge. The device is compact and lightweight, designed for handheld use and portability. The overall appearance is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, light purple Samsung smartphone with a large display, triple rear cameras, and minimal bezels. The design is modern and compact, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a centered punch-hole camera and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the slim profile and visible side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte purple finish, triple camera array, flash, and Samsung logo.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the slim edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed Samsung text centered on the back, subtle and matching the purple color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with pink, purple, and blue brush strokes. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a flash to the right of the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Two slim physical buttons on the right edge: a longer volume rocker above and a smaller power button below.
